question: Which text label appears at the top of the screen when the craft materials are displayed? A. TOYS FROM TRASH B. JET CAR C. MATERIALS D. BOTTLE JET CAR

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A hand holds a transparent plastic bottle modified with beige button wheels attached to the sides. A red balloon connects to the bottle neck through a green bent straw for propulsion. Text overlays label the object as a 'Jet Car' and identify materials like needles and rubber bands. The components are arranged on a solid blue background during the materials display section.

Describe the visual progression of title cards and objects from the start until the materials are shown.
canonical_answer: At 0s, text 'Arvind G' displays above a hexagon graphic; at 2s, 'Arvind Gupta Toys' appears beside a polyhedron model; at 4s, a hand touches a bottle car while 'TOYS FROM TRASH' displays; at 8s, individual materials like buttons and a straw are laid out with labels.
